entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 29,074,000. This concept is used to report the fair value of investments for the ck0002008748:TextilesApparelLuxuryGoodsMember industry. The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 29,152,000 that includes the member ck0002008748:TextilesApparelLuxuryGoodsMember but also has additional members. This value is used to report the fair value of investments for the following dimensions srt:OwnershipAxis=ck0002008748:KravetIncTermLoanMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=ck0002008748:TextilesApparelLuxuryGoodsMember. The value representing the fair value of investments in the ck0002008748:TextilesApparelLuxuryGoodsMember industry is less than the value reported for the value 29,152,000 which is a subset of this industry. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 29,152,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 29,152,000 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : srt:OwnershipAxis=ck0002008748:KravetIncTermLoanMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=ck0002008748:TextilesApparelLuxuryGoodsMember
Rule Element Id:10722 Rule version: 29.0.2 - c115705_10k-ixbrl.htm 11595

[DQC.US.0207.10722] The filer has reported a value for the concept InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue with a value of 39,421,000. The value reported for the industry in aggregate should be more than or equal to the value reported for of 39,616,000. Please ensure that appropriate dimensions have been used to report these values.
Concept : us-gaap:InvestmentOwnedAtFairValue Value : 39,616,000 Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : srt:OwnershipAxis=ck0002008748:AppliedAerospaceStructuresCorpTermLoanMember, us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesByIndustryAxis=ck0002008748:AerospaceAndDefenseMember
